message.content:
@startuml
participant "ConnectInterceptor" as ConnectInterceptor #D3D3D3
participant "StreamAllocation" as StreamAllocation #E6E6FA
participant "RealConnection" as RealConnection #F0FFFF
participant "Http2Connection" as Http2Connection #FFB6C1
participant "CallServerInterceptor" as CallServerInterceptor #98FB98
participant "Http2Codec" as Http2Codec #ADD8E6
participant "Http2Writer" as Http2Writer #FFE4B5
participant "Sink" as Sink #DDA0DD
participant "Socket" as Socket #AFEEEE
participant "ReaderRunnable" as ReaderRunnable #7FFF00
participant "Http2Read" as Http2Read #DC143C
participant "Http2Stream" as Http2Stream #CD5C5C
participant "Source" as Source #DEB887

== 发送请求 ==
activate ConnectInterceptor 
    activate StreamAllocation  
        connect ->> RealConnection : newStream()   
            start( ) --> Http2Connection    
                writeRequestHeaders--> Http2Codec     
                    synStream->> Http2Writer      
                        write-->> Sink       
                            write -->> Socket        
                                execute()->> ReaderRunable         
                                    nextFrame () - > Http2Read          
                                        handle <-- Http2Connection           
                                            receiveXXX()- >> Http2Stream            
                                                read ()->> Source             
                                                    deactivate Source              
                                                        return                
                                                            end if               
                                                                endif                 
                                                                    else                   
                                                                        elseif                  
                                                                            then                    
                                                                                while                     
                                                                                    do                        
                                                                                        loop                            
                                                                                            for                                 
                                                                                                foreach                                     
                                                                                                    
@enduml
